blockingIssues.description: This rerun fix only repoints VAL-CROSS-003 determinism coverage; it does not repair the original scrutiny failure because `test/e2e/test_e2e.ml` still compiles an inline duplicate CRUD program instead of the tracked `.factory/runtime/interop-crud.rg` fixture in the reviewed commit.

The e2e regression test now reads `.factory/runtime/interop-crud.rg`, but `test/e2e/dune` still does not declare that tracked fixture as a dependency, so ordinary `dune runtest -j 16` invalidation can skip re-running the regression when the fixture changes.

appliedUpdates.description: Aligned `.factory/library/user-testing.md` so live HTTP validation and automation now both point at the tracked `.factory/runtime/interop-crud.rg` fixture instead of conflicting with `.factory/library/environment.md`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document that dune ignores hidden top-level directories like `.factory` unless the repo opts them in with `(dirs :standard .factory)` and test stanzas add explicit fixture `deps`.
